title: 82nd GMR: IOF Shot and Injured 104 Palestinian Civilians, including 43 Children, a Woman and a Paramedic
pages_or_sections: Opening cumulative paragraph: PCHR documented 214 civilian killings by IOF, including 46 children and 2 women, since 30 March 2018.
strengths: Gives cumulative civilian killings and separates children and women at a single episode boundary.
limitations: Not an official demographic source, and it does not explicitly say whether the women category means adult women only.
notes: Primary fatality source for this bundle.

title: Two years on: people injured and traumatized during the Great March of Return are still struggling
pages_or_sections: Opening paragraph: 214 Palestinians, including 46 children, were killed during the Great March of Return period.
strengths: Independent UN corroboration of the total and child counts.
limitations: Does not provide the women count needed for a full sex-age package.
notes: Used as a corroborative check, not the primary women source.

title: On the Occasion of the International Population Day 11/7/2018
pages_or_sections: Paragraph giving Gaza Strip population 1.90 million, including 963,000 males and 936,000 females.
strengths: Official Gaza-wide population and sex totals close to the protest period.
limitations: Does not provide the under-18 share for this specific release.

title: Palestinian Children's Day 2018
pages_or_sections: Paragraph stating that children under 18 were 48.0% of Gaza Strip's population.
strengths: Official under-18 share specific to Gaza and tightly matched to the protest period.
limitations: Whole-population baseline does not account for the male-skewed participation pattern at the fence.
